statement: In every magma, Equation 4206 (`x * y = ((z * x) * w) * w`) implies Equation 4100 (`x * x = ((y * z) * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0886
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z x) w) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op (op y z) x) x)
